calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gwen Wu, via Zoom, for and with Valerie Wayne, Administrator.

The court confirms with Ms. Wu that the proposed order regarding the instant petition submitted to the court is only as to the Estate's real property and does not include an omnibus clause and therefore the residual beneficiaries would not be impacted if the court grants the instant petition. The court offers its tentative ruling to grant the petition and confirms that there are no appearances to object.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Sil Liapis appeared by zoom for Valerie Wayne (Administrator).

Mr. Liapis stated that the petition for final distribution is not ready to be filed, that he had a number of personal emergencies and was unable to get the petition done, and that he can file a petition for approval of report on status of administration by the end of this week. Status on close of estate is continued to December 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
